_description: Academic source citations for Cultural Knowledge Base v3

sources.title: Geography of Kampuchea-Krom
sources.data_used: 21 provinces + 2 islands + 1 port of Kampuchea Krom with Khmer script names

sources.title: The Culture of the Khmer-Krom
sources.data_used: Festival details (Chol Chnam Thmey, Don-Ta, Ork Ombok, Buddhist festivals), traditional sports (ox racing, boat racing), cultural practices

sources.title: Khmer Krom
sources.data_used: Demographics, distribution, historical context, cultural overview

sources.title: Sóc Trăng province
sources.data_used: Etymology (Srok Khleang), administrative divisions, Khmer name ខេត្តឃ្លាំង

sources.title: Trà Vinh province
sources.data_used: Etymology (Preah Trapeang), demographics (30% Khmer), Khmer name ព្រះត្រពាំង

sources.title: An Giang province
sources.data_used: Historical place names (Moth Chrouk, Psar Dek), administrative history

sources.title: Family words in Khmer
sources.data_used: Complete Khmer kinship terminology with script + romanization + formal/informal variants

sources.title: Pinpeat
